dailyReport.title: Download daily report
dailyReport.projectHint: If no project is selected, data from all projects is included.

sheets.issue: ISSUE: Important issues shared to customers
sheets.data: Data: Daily integrated report for issues/requests/notices
sheets.volume: Post volume: Posts by time slot

errors.needDates: Please select both start and end dates.
errors.startAfterEnd: Start date cannot be later than end date.

ui.summarySubtitle: Download trends for in-game, content, anti-cheat, and community in a single Excel file.
ui.step1Hint: Same template; only the downloaded filename differs by channel.
ui.step3Hint: The Excel includes an overview, best/worst issues of the week, and detailed tables by category.
ui.vocCardSubtitle: Source: Upload daily VoC report Excel · Output: Generate weekly monitoring report Excel
ui.vocStep1Title: 1. Upload source file (daily VoC report Excel)
ui.generatingBannerBody: The server is generating the weekly report Excel. It may take a few minutes. When done, the list below updates. If you only see the alert and the list is empty, click “Refresh outputs” to check.
ui.outputReadyHint: Outputs will appear here when generation completes.

guide.li1: The report header auto-fills target, period, and author.
guide.li2: Includes overview and best/worst trend blocks for the week.
guide.li3: Generates tables by section: in-game, content, anti-cheat, community, esports, other.
guide.li4: Description uses AI summary first (aiClassificationReason → summary → detail).
guide.li5: Link column uses numeric hyperlink “1” and applies thin borders to all cells.

errors.downloadError: An error occurred while downloading the weekly report.
errors.timeout: The request timed out. Please try again.
errors.backendUnreachable: Cannot reach the backend. Is it running (default port 9080)?
errors.invalidRange: Please enter a valid start and end date.
errors.outputNotFound: Output file not found. Please regenerate.

nonJson.gatewayTimeout: Gateway timeout (502/504). Increase proxy_read_timeout or refresh the output list later to check completion.
nonJson.htmlError: The server returned an HTML error page instead of JSON. Refresh the output list to check if generation completed.

partnerArchiving.title: Partner video archiving
partnerArchiving.subtitle: Upload a partner list managed in Excel to generate an Excel file containing metadata for YouTube/TikTok/Instagram videos and posts uploaded during the selected week (Mon 00:00 ~ Sun 23:59). Battlegrounds-related and other content are split into separate sheets. (Videos are not downloaded; metadata only.)

errors.needExcel: Please upload the channel list Excel file.
errors.timeout15m: The request timed out (15 minutes). If there are many channels, split the list and retry.
errors.timeout504: Server response timed out (504 Gateway Timeout). Try again later or split the channel list.

buttons.collecting: Collecting… (may take a few minutes depending on channel count)

form.referenceHint: Collect based on the week containing the selected date (Mon 00:00 ~ Sun 23:59, Korea time).
form.referenceWarn: ⚠️ Only videos uploaded during this period are collected. If results are small, check the period.
form.excelHintPrefix: The first sheet must include columns in the header:
form.excelHintColumns: channel name (required), platform (optional: YouTube / TikTok / Instagram), YouTube URL or channel ID (for YouTube), TikTok URL or username (for TikTok), Instagram URL or username (for Instagram), live URL (optional).
form.channelIdHint: ⚠️ Entering channel IDs directly can save quota and improve accuracy.

result.title: Result
result.noErrorDetails: Could not load error details. Check server logs.
